svg.text: MARLIE 1 — LAFAYETTE AI FACTORY & COMMAND CENTER
ELECTRICAL SINGLE-LINE DIAGRAM | 800V DC NATIVE | EATON BEAM RUBIN DSX | 1,300 kW IT LOAD
Sheet E-001 | Design Intent | 2026-04-02 | NOT FOR CONSTRUCTION
800V DC DISTRIBUTION BUS — NVIDIA DSX REFERENCE ARCHITECTURE
1. 2x Bloom Energy SOFC natural gas fuel cells: 1.03 MW each, 800V DC Direct output ► ATMOS gas on property, Henry Hub 40 mi
2. N+1 redundancy: each genset carries full IT load (1,240 kW on 2,060 kW capacity)
3. DUAL POWER STACK: Eaton Beam Rubin DSX (facility) + Delta (rack). Eaton ORV3 Sidecar rectifiers: 480V AC to 800V DC (genset emergency path only)
4. Delta 660 kW Power Rack (6x 110 kW shelves, 480 kW embedded BBU). Delta e-Fuse (SiC, <3 us). Delta 90 kW DC/DC (800V to 50V MGX)
5. 300 kW rooftop solar DC-Direct at 97% eff. TI GaN + Infineon CoolGaN IBC at die — 99%+ eff
6. LUS grid is BACKUP ONLY (Layer 4). BESS 600 kWh ride-through. Diesel genset (Layer 3) auto-start
7. 10 NVL72 racks across 2 floors: 720 GPUs total, 1,300 kW IT load, 1 CoolIT CHx200 CDU pair per floor
LAYER 1: SOLAR — Primary Offset — 300 kW rooftop
LAYER 2: NATURAL GAS — Backbone — 2x BLOOM SOFC 24/7
LAYER 4: GRID (LUS) — Backup Only — dual feed
